metadata.description: A complete AI-powered content creation toolkit — scripts, ideas, thumbnails, analytics, and full management for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X.

plugins.name: video-scriptwriter
plugins.description: Write polished, ready-to-shoot video scripts for YouTube, TikTok, Reels, ads, and more — with .docx export

plugins.name: content-ideas
plugins.description: Generate content ideas, video concepts, and full content calendars for any platform or niche

plugins.name: thumbnail-title-optimizer
plugins.description: Generate high-CTR titles with scoring analysis and detailed thumbnail design briefs

plugins.name: analytics-checker
plugins.description: Interpret platform analytics and turn metrics into clear, actionable recommendations

plugins.name: youtube-manager
plugins.description: Manage your YouTube channel — descriptions, tags, chapters, comments, and channel reports

plugins.name: instagram-manager
plugins.description: Write Instagram captions, hashtag sets, plan feed content, and grow your Instagram presence

plugins.name: tiktok-manager
plugins.description: Create viral TikTok content — hooks, captions, FYP optimization, and trend research

plugins.name: linkedin-manager
plugins.description: Write LinkedIn posts, optimize your profile, draft outreach, and build professional authority

plugins.name: twitter-manager
plugins.description: Write high-performing tweets and threads, grow your following, and develop your X voice
